languages.text: "Так и есть, вашество: я {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}этого полка{/g} первый сержант. С другими гвардейцами, высокородными, обученными, может кто поумнее меня нужен. А с этими своя наука: слова верные подбирать надобно, чтобы до худого дела не доводить. Тоже ведь люди, как-никак, солдаты {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Так и есть, вашество: я {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}этого полка{/g} первый сержант. С другими гвардейцами, высокородными, обученными, может кто поумнее меня нужен. А с этими своя наука: слова верные подбирать надобно, чтобы до худого дела не доводить. Тоже ведь люди, как-никак, солдаты {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

languages.text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

Тоже ведь люди, как-никак, солдаты {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g}".

languages.text: “没错，大人。我是这个{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}军团{/g}的第一任军士。要是对付那些出身高贵、受过训练的卫兵，也许您得找个比我更聪明的人。但对付这帮人，我自有一套。说话得讲分寸，才能让他们听得进去。毕竟，他们也是人，也是{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的士兵。”
languages.original_text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “没错，大人。我是这个{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}军团{/g}的第一任军士。要是对付那些出身高贵、受过训练的卫兵，也许您得找个比我更聪明的人。但对付这帮人，我自有一套。说话得讲分寸，才能让他们听得进去。毕竟，他们也是人，也是{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的士兵。”

languages.text: « C'est bien ça, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Je suis le tout premier sergent de ce {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}régiment{/g}. Pour commander les autres gardes impériaux, bien nés et bien entraînés, il faudrait peut-être quelqu'un de plus malin que moi, mais avec ces gars-là, j'ai compris le truc : on doit choisir ses mots avec soin si on veut obtenir de bons résultats. Ce sont des êtres humains, après tout, et des soldats de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

Pour commander les autres gardes impériaux, bien nés et bien entraînés, il faudrait peut-être quelqu'un de plus malin que moi, mais avec ces gars-là, j'ai compris le truc : on doit choisir ses mots avec soin si on veut obtenir de bons résultats. Ce sont des êtres humains, après tout, et des soldats de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. »

languages.text: "Doğrudur {mf|lordum|leydim}. Ben bu {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}alayın{/g} ilk çavuşuyum. Soylu ve eğitimli Muhafızlarımız var, bu mevkiyi onların hak ettiğini düşünebilirsiniz. Ancak ben bu adamları iyi tanırım. Sözünüz dinlensin istiyorsanız kelimelerinizi dikkatli seçmelisiniz. Sonuçta onlar da insan, hepsi birer {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} askeri."
languages.original_text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Doğrudur {mf|lordum|leydim}. Ben bu {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}alayın{/g} ilk çavuşuyum. Soylu ve eğitimli Muhafızlarımız var, bu mevkiyi onların hak ettiğini düşünebilirsiniz. Ancak ben bu adamları iyi tanırım. Sözünüz dinlensin istiyorsanız kelimelerinizi dikkatli seçmelisiniz. Sonuçta onlar da insan, hepsi birer {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} askeri."

languages.text: «Eso es, mi {mf|señor|señora}: soy el primer sargento en la historia de este {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regimiento{/g}. En el caso de otros Guardias, nobles y bien entrenados, se necesitaría a alguien más listo que yo, pero, con esta panda, tengo un truco: hay que elegir bien las palabras para obtener buenos resultados. Ellos también son seres humanos, después de todo, y soldados del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}».
languages.original_text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Eso es, mi {mf|señor|señora}: soy el primer sargento en la historia de este {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regimiento{/g}. En el caso de otros Guardias, nobles y bien entrenados, se necesitaría a alguien más listo que yo, pero, con esta panda, tengo un truco: hay que elegir bien las palabras para obtener buenos resultados. Ellos también son seres humanos, después de todo, y soldados del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}».

languages.text: "Genauso ist es, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}: Ich bin der erste Sergeant dieses {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Regiments{/g}. Für andere Gardisten, hochgeboren und ausgebildet, bräuchtet Ihr vermutlich jemanden, der klüger ist. Aber bei diesem Haufen hab ich den Dreh raus: Man muss seine Worte sorgfältig wählen, wenn man gute Ergebnisse will. Sie sind schließlich immer noch menschliche Wesen, nicht nur Soldaten des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Genauso ist es, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}: Ich bin der erste Sergeant dieses {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Regiments{/g}. Sie sind schließlich immer noch menschliche Wesen, nicht nur Soldaten des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g}."

languages.text: 「まさにその通りです、殿。この{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}連隊{/g}で初めて任命された大尉です。他の衛兵たちは、高貴な生まれで訓練を受けた者たちです。彼らなら、私より賢い大尉が必要かもしれません。でも、この連隊の兵士たちには、私が心得た方法があります。良い結果を得るためには、言葉を選びなさい。彼らは人間であり、{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}の兵士です。」
languages.original_text: "Exactly right, my {mf|lord|lady}: I'm this {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regiment{/g}'s first ever sergeant. With other Guardsmen, high-born and trained, maybe you'd need someone smarter than me. But with this lot, I've found the knack: you've got to choose your words carefully if you want good results. They're human beings too, after all, and soldiers of {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}."
